{{Infobox character
| name = First Director of the Magic Tower
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director of the Magic Tower]] has three shadows behind him.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director of the Magic Tower]] employed two guardian mages.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director of the Magic Tower]] visited [[Dornoth]] Four last week.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
